calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants, Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF KELLY IRIBARREN'S Motion To Compel Further Responses From Defendants, Request For Sanctions is off calendar. Notice of Conditional Settlement Filed March 15, 2018, accordingly, this hearing is vacated pursuant to Rule 3.1385 (c)(A). Judge: David M. Hellbraun; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (D302).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Set For Trial On Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
